title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Gains 12% in a Year: More Upside Left?
text: Strong performing segments, strategic buyouts to capitalize on growing markets opportunities, sturdy financial standing and effective capital deployment continue to drive Brown & Brown (BRO).

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Up 5.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
